---
title: "hw1"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r}
options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"))

install.packages("HistData")
library(HistData)
head(GaltonFamilies)
```

```{r}
mod <- lm(childHeight ~ midparentHeight, data = GaltonFamilies)
coefficients(mod)
```

\*Same as alpha_fit = 22.63624 and beta_fit = 0.6373609 on page 9 of the text

```{r}
plot(childHeight ~ midparentHeight, data = GaltonFamilies, 
     main = "Galton Parent-Child Height Regression", 
     xlab = "midparentHeight", 
     ylab = "childHeight")

abline(mod, col = "red", lwd = 2)
```
